job_ad_description: We are looking for an exceptional Developer Programmer to support our ever-expanding agency. We’ve been delivering digital marketing solutions for well over ten years and have incredible strategy and production teams ready to support you.If you are successful with this application you will play a pivotal role within our Development Department, joining a highly talented front and back-end development team. You will need to be an experienced developer with extensive coding knowledge and skills.You will also need the perfect balance of technical skills and the ability to communicate effectively. You will need to possess the ability to easily switch between technical talk and collaborative teamwork as you design, develop, modify, document, test, implement, install and support software applications and systems.You will need to eat, sleep and breathe all things technical and have the passion and determination to deliver exceptional results working on big brand projects.This is an exciting opportunity to be part of an agency delivering quality through collaboration at a high service level for high end clients across varying industries. Our team is filled with only the best talent in the industry and we want our new Developer Programmer to match us in experience and expertise.If you feel you have the experience, composure, technical skillset and desire to succeed, we would love the opportunity to meet with you at your convenience.To be considered, you will need to demonstrate the following: · Minimum 3 years of software development experience· Experience researching, analysing and evaluating system requirements· Extensive experience with Javascript ES6· Widespread CMS experience, preferably with Silverstripe and Wordpress· MySQL Database architecture experience· JavaScript (React.js), Version control (Git)· Web development best-practices (accessibility, cross-device and cross-browser)· Thrive in a high paced Agile environment· Be fastidious about code quality & security· Have a hacker mentality, know how to break things - and fix themWhat you’ll be doing: · Writing and maintaining program code to meet requirements and technical specifications· Writing, updating and maintaining our clients sites and systems· Producing end user documentation and operational procedures· Evaluating needs through researching, consulting and analysing· Identifying technology limitations and deficiencies in existing systems and associated processes, procedures and methods· Working with our team to test, debug and correct errors and faults in our existing system and code base.Job Types: Full-time, PermanentSalary: $95,000.00 per yearBenefits:Work from homeSchedule:8 hour shift
